errors.BAD_REQUEST: Something looks off — please try again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have access to that.
errors.CONFLICT: That's already taken or in use.
errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: Our servers hiccuped. Please try again.
errors.EMAIL_ALREADY_REGISTERED: An account with this email already exists. Sign in instead.
errors.REFRESH_TOKEN_INVALID: Session expired — please sign in again.
errors.GOOGLE_ID_TOKEN_INVALID: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
errors.DAILY_QUOTA_EXCEEDED: You've hit your daily limit of {{limit}} replies. Upgrade to keep going.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Slow down a bit — try again in a moment.
errors.UPLOAD_FAILED: We couldn't upload that screenshot. Please try again.
errors.SCREENSHOT_INVALID: We couldn't read that image. Try a clearer screenshot.
errors.OCR_FAILED: We had trouble reading the text. Try a sharper screenshot.
errors.NO_MESSAGES_DETECTED: We didn't see any messages in that screenshot.
errors.LLM_UPSTREAM_ERROR: Our AI is taking a quick break. Please try again.
errors.CONTENT_BLOCKED: We can't generate a reply for this conversation.
